name: controlium
description: Drive your real Chrome over CDP, bringing the working tab to the front with a synthetic cursor.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to the Controlium Chrome extension via a shared local bridge. Claude can open tabs, navigate, click, type, screenshot and read pages in your real Chrome — always bringing the working tab to the front and showing a visible cursor. Requires the Controlium extension to be loaded in Chrome. All Claude apps (Code and Desktop) share one background bridge on port 8765, so any number of them can coexist without port conflicts.
